features.notes: openModelFromFuncall and RichFunctionViewEditor are declared in package.ts; the actual RichFunctionView implementation lives in @datagrok-libraries/compute-utils (outside this package).
CustomStringInput is the only TS member; the rest are server-side scripts and docs.
Feature is composed entirely of bundled JS scripts and external doc pages; Diff Studio engine itself lives outside this package.
All six validators and ObjectCoolingSelector are decorated functions in package.ts paired with the Object cooling / Heat Exchange scripts.
OutliersSelectionViewer class implements the only remaining model-optimization surface in this package; package.ts registers it as a viewer.
CustomDataUploader, CustomUploader, and CustomCustomizer are all decorated functions defined directly in package.ts.
PipelineStepEditor is a thin decorator in package.ts wrapping RichFunctionView.fromFuncCall from compute-utils.
Documentation-only feature; no source file in this package implements it.
Feature is composed entirely of server-side scripts (Python/R); no TS implementation file.
